profile.name: Jaydenn
profile.title: Web Developer
profile.tagline: I craft intuitive digital experiences that put people first — blending clean interfaces with thoughtful interaction design.
profile.subtext: Passionate about accessible design, rapid prototyping, and turning complex problems into simple, elegant flows.

projects.title: Layagconnect
projects.description: LayagConnect is a multi-user chat and membership application built in Java. It follows a client-server architecture, the Server and the Client.

projects.title: Movie Rental System
projects.description: A simple terminal-based movie rental system. It automatically computes total cost, total stocks, and total sales.

projects.title: Layag Website UI/UX
projects.description: Frontend design of the Layag Website. It follows color theory, and basic design principles.

about.bio: I'm a UI/UX designer and front-end developer with a soft spot for clean systems — in code and in communities. Outside of design tools, I spend my time building programs that give young people a place to grow, lead, and be heard.

trainings.name: Division Training on Innovation and Robotics

experience.title: Founder & President
experience.description: Founded an organization focused on science, technology, and community impact.

experience.title: Committee Chairperson on Governance
experience.description: Authored a pioneering resolution advocating for the integration of voter education for SK voters aged 15–17 in local youth development plans

experience.title: City Youth Vice Mayor
experience.description: Drafted resolutions and participated in formal training on parliamentary procedures with city government officials

experience.description: Competitive national scholarship awarded to outstanding STEM students. Selected as one of the top 12% of examinees (10,907 out of 84,518) for excellence in science and mathematics
